Profile

Select a contact from the sidebar to view their profile and history.

Profile

Linked profiles (alias merge)

    Unlink detaches the row; channel rows already moved to the primary stay there.

    Channels
    Connected Services
    AI Suggestions
    Local Intelligence

    Merge Contact

    Select the primary identity to merge into. Channels and notes move to the primary; the other row stays as a reversible alias (unlink from the profile panel).

    Edit Contact Profile
